query:
SELECT
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost AS currentCost,
  p.partner_buy_price AS pricebookCost,
  p.sheet_name AS sheet,
  c.name AS customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
JOIN sasboss_pricebook_items p
  ON p.version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1)
  AND LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE
  s.status != 'terminated'
  AND LOWER(IFNULL(s.billingPlatform,'')) LIKE '%sasboss%'
  AND ABS(IFNULL(s.monthlyCost, -999) - IFNULL(p.partner_buy_price, -999)) > 0.005
ORDER BY c.name, s.planName
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost AS currentCost,
  p.partner_buy_price AS pricebookCost,
  p.sheet_name AS sheet,
  c.name AS customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
JOIN sasboss_pricebook_items p
  ON p.version_id = (SELECT id FROM sasboss_pricebook_versions WHERE is_active = 1 LIMIT 1)
  AND LOWER(TRIM(s.planName)) = LOWER(TRIM(p.product_name))
WHERE
  s.status != 'terminated'
  AND LOWER(IFNULL(s.billingPlatform,'')) LIKE '%sasboss%'
  AND ABS(IFNULL(s.monthlyCost, -999) - IFNULL(p.partner_buy_price, -999)) > 0.005
ORDER BY c.name, s.planName
LIMIT 50;
